title: App is currently blocked from API usage
excerpt: When querying data from a board, I get the following error message “This app is currently blocked from API usage”. Does anyone know what might be causing this?

posts.author: Ramalho (M. Ramalho)
posts.cookedHtml: When querying data from a board, I get the following error message “This app is currently blocked from API usage”. Does anyone know what might be causing this?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: There is an ongoing platform issue likely causing this. See https://status.monday.com/

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!

Yes. This was an issue that we had, and that is fixed now

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: I will be honest, I disagree with the use of the word momentary. Several hours is not momentary.
